# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for deploying my application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

dependencies: []

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      replicas: 1
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}
        spec:
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            fsGroup: 1000
          containers:
            - name: {{ .Release.Name }}
              image: "my-app:latest"
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80
              livenessProbe:
                httpGet:
                  path: /health
                  port: 80
                initialDelaySeconds: 30
                periodSeconds: 10
              readinessProbe:
                httpGet:
                  path: /ready
                  port: 80
                initialDelaySeconds: 5
                periodSeconds: 10

  service.yaml:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      type: ClusterIP
      ports:
        - port: 80
          targetPort: 80
      selector:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}

  ingress.yaml:
    apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
    kind: Ingress
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
      annotations:
        nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
    spec:
      rules:
        - host: {{ .Values.host }}
          http:
            paths:
              - path: /
                pathType: Prefix
                backend:
                  service:
                    name: {{ .Release.Name }}
                    port:
                      number: 80

values.yaml:
host: my-app.local

README.md:
# My App Helm Chart
This chart deploys My App on Kubernetes. Adjust the values in `values.yaml` as needed.
